content.hint: 表达你会查看并保持沟通，适合职场收尾场景

blanks.answer: I'll review it and let you know if I have any questions.
options: I'll review it and let you know if I have any questions.
I will check it tomorrow and call you.
You're welcome, I'll do the same.
No problem, I already know everything.

content.situation: 你刚和同事完成一个项目进度会议，对方说已经整理好会议纪要并会发给你，你需要礼貌回应并确认后续沟通方式。
content.speakerText: I've summarized the key points and will email them to you by end of day.
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经总结了重点，今天结束前发邮件给你。
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌确认后续跟进方式

content.hint: 表达开放的后续支持，是客户服务中的标准收尾方式

blanks.answer: Feel free to reach out if anything else comes up.
options: Feel free to reach out if anything else comes up.
I hope you have a nice weekend.
I'm glad I could help, bye now.
Don't worry, it won't happen again.

content.situation: 你刚帮客户解决了账户问题，客户表示感谢，你需要礼貌结束对话并表明如有其他问题可随时联系。
content.speakerText: Thank you so much for resolving this so quickly!
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你这么快就解决了这个问题！
content.knowledgePoint: 提供持续支持的礼貌表达

content.hint: 表达你会主动更新进展，体现责任感和协作态度

blanks.answer: I'll keep you posted if anything changes.
options: I'll keep you posted if anything changes.

content.situation: 你和团队成员完成了一次远程协作，对方确认任务已分配完毕，你需要简洁确认并友好结束对话。
content.speakerText: All tasks are assigned and shared in the project tracker.
content.speakerTextCn: 所有任务都已分配并同步到项目追踪器了。
content.knowledgePoint: 简洁确认+主动跟进的职场收尾表达

content.hint: 表达‘后续回复’的最自然职场短语
content.template: Thanks! I'll review it by tomorrow and ______ you.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：get back to someone（后续回复某人）

content.hint: 简洁表达感谢的常用口语短语
content.template: Everything looks good. ______ for your help!
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频感谢表达：Appreciate it（非正式但专业）

content.hint: 用于确认无问题时的简洁收尾词
content.template: All ______. Thanks again and have a great day!
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：All clear（确认无误，收尾常用）
